---
title: "Who We Are"
css: style.css
listing:
  - id: wp1-listing
    contents: data/people-wp1.yml
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, name, role, affiliation, orcid, description]
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
  - id: wp2-listing
    contents: data/people-wp2.yml
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, name, role, affiliation, orcid, description]
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
  - id: wp3-listing
    contents: data/people-wp3.yml
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, name, role, affiliation, orcid, description]
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
  - id: wp4-listing
    contents: data/people-wp4.yml
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, name, role, affiliation, orcid, description]
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
---

DP-Next will be carried out by a cross-disciplinary team of
epidemiologists, clinicians, health scientists and data scientists
across all seven Steno Diabetes Centres.

::: {.wp-nav}
[WP1](#wp1) | [WP2](#wp2) | [WP3](#wp3) | [WP4](#wp4)
:::

## WP1 {#wp1}

::: {#wp1-listing}
:::

## WP2 {#wp2}

::: {#wp2-listing}
:::

## WP3 {#wp3}

::: {#wp3-listing}
:::

## WP4 {#wp4}

::: {#wp4-listing}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
.listing-card img {
  width: 120px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}
.wp-nav {
  margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem;
}
</style>
```
